schemes.name: Synthetic identity at intake
schemes.description: Fabricated SSN-name-DOB triples used to file fresh applications. Detection joins BFO intake against Treasury IPP and SSA Death Master plus CISA threat-intel feeds for known synthetic-ID patterns.

schemes.name: Cross-program double-dipping
schemes.description: Single beneficiary collecting on overlapping means-tested programs across regional offices that historically did not share eligibility state.

schemes.name: Deceased-payee continuation
schemes.description: Benefits continuing after beneficiary death. Detection joins payment ledger against SSA Death Master plus state vital-records feeds.

schemes.name: Ineligible-provider claims (RHAV)
schemes.description: Providers billing the voucher program after license suspension or NPI revocation. Cross-checked against GSA SAM.gov exclusions and CMS feeds.

schemes.name: Address-of-record manipulation
schemes.description: Bulk address updates routing benefits to mail drops. Detection clusters by USPS NCOA delta and applies graph rules to identify shared destination addresses.

agent_queue.recommendation: Hold disbursement on 412 flagged applications pending Treasury IPP secondary validation. Confidence 0.94.
Auto-suspend payments on 89 cases matched against SSA Death Master plus two state vital-records feeds. Confidence 0.98.
Route 1,204 multi-program enrollees to Improper Payments Office for eligibility reconciliation. Confidence 0.86.
Deny pending claims from 28 providers flagged on GSA SAM.gov exclusion list within last 30 days. Confidence 0.99.
